source: SARS PAYE-GEN-01-G03 (Rev 16) + PAYE-GEN-01-G03-A01 (Rev 19) Rate per Kilometre Schedule — Effective 1 March 2026

travel_allowance_rules.reduced_rate_condition: Employer satisfied that at least 80% of vehicle use will be for business purposes. Determination must be made monthly.
travel_allowance_rules.fuel_cost_claim_restriction: No fuel cost claim if employee did not bear full fuel cost
travel_allowance_rules.maintenance_cost_claim_restriction: No maintenance cost claim if vehicle covered by maintenance plan
travel_allowance_rules.proration: Fixed cost pro-rated if vehicle used for business for less than full year of assessment
travel_allowance_rules.combined_allowances: Where fixed travel allowance (3701) is paid in addition to reimbursive allowance (3702/3703), both amounts are combined on SARS assessment and treated as a taxable travel allowance

at_or_below_prescribed_rate_no_other_all.condition: Reimbursive allowance does not exceed R4.95/km AND no other travel compensation paid

at_or_below_prescribed_rate_with_other_a.condition: Reimbursive allowance does not exceed R4.95/km but other travel allowance (3701) also paid

exceeds_prescribed_rate.note: Amount up to R4.95/km → code 3702 (not subject to PAYE). Excess above R4.95/km → code 3722 (subject to PAYE). Example: employer pays R5.95/km for 1,000km → 3702 = R4,950; 3722 = R1,000

subsistence_allowance.source: Section 8(1)(a) and 8(1)(c) Income Tax Act No. 58 of 1962

domestic.note: Deemed amounts for employees absent from usual place of residence within the Republic. Employees' tax must NOT be deducted from subsistence allowance.

foreign.note: Country-specific amounts published in PAYE-GEN-01-G03-A02 Subsistence Allowance in respect of Foreign Travel.

simplified_method.condition: Applies where section 8(1)(b)(iii) is applicable AND no other compensation (other than parking or toll fees) is payable by the employer. Rate is at the option of the recipient.

notes.ty2027_changes: Vehicle value bands restructured: now 9 bands in R115,000 increments (was 8 bands in R100,000 increments). Reimbursive rate R4.76→R4.95/km. All fixed cost and fuel/maintenance values updated.
notes.table_status: CONFIRMED — sourced from official SARS PAYE-GEN-01-G03-A01 Revision 19, effective 1 March 2026.
notes.vs_ty2026: TY2026 had 8 bands (100k increments to 700k+). TY2027 has 9 bands (115k increments to 920k+). TY2026 doc: SARS_TRAVEL_2026 (expired 28 Feb 2026).
